## Compatibility / Contract Impact

- [ ] No CLI, schema, Action input, evidence, or documented contract changes.
- [ ] Contract changes are additive and documented.
- [ ] Breaking behavior is intentionally versioned or justified.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `pytest` or focused test command run.
- [ ] `ruff check` / format check run where relevant.
- [ ] `schema audit --stability stable` considered for contract-facing changes.
- [ ] Skipped steps are listed with reasons.
